institutional_summary: No recent 13D/13G activist filings were found, but there is significant unusual options activity in NVIDIA and Apple, indicating strong bullish sentiment from institutional investors. The confidence levels for the signals are high, particularly for the analyst upgrades in NVDA and AAPL, which are corroborated by unusual options activity. No convergence signals were identified in this data set.
